## Qaid v0.1.0 — First React + PWA release

Reborn from a 3140-line vanilla `index.html` as a typed React app with an installable PWA shell.

### Highlights
- **React 18 + Vite 5 + TypeScript strict**
- **Pure scoring engine** with 31 Vitest cases — covers Sebeeta, Kout (all six contract levels), and Custom
- **Three game modes**
  - *Sebeeta* — 6 players, 2 teams of 3, first individual to hit threshold makes their team lose
  - *Kout* — contract entry (bab, 6, 7, 8, bawan, malzoom) or manual, first team to threshold wins
  - *Custom* — 2–6 players, configurable threshold and win rule (highest or lowest wins)
- **Bilingual** — English + Arabic, `<html lang/dir>` synced
- **Modern theme** (light) with derived dark mode
- **Persistent state** — `localStorage["cardScoreTracker_v1"]`, legacy-compatible
- **Installable PWA** — manifest, service worker (Workbox autoUpdate), 192/512/maskable icons, iOS apple-touch-icon
- **CI** — typecheck + tests + build on every push and PR (Node 20)

### Stack
React 18 · Vite 5 · TypeScript · Vitest + jsdom · vite-plugin-pwa · sharp (icon generation)

### Verification
`npm run typecheck` clean · `npm test` 31/31 · `npm run build` 17-entry Workbox precache (~262 KB)
